stickers_description: Beka isitika se-bitcoin emphakathini ukuze u-orange pill abakuzungezile.
stickers_choose_c1: Umgomo wethu ukukusiza u-orange pill abantu abaningi ngokubeka izitika ze-Bitcoin emphakathini. Zonke izitika zethu zinamakhodi e-QR axhumana namakhasi emfundo nge
stickers_instructions_1: Faka ikheli lakho lokuthumela bese sithumela iphakethe lezitika ze-Bitcoin zamahhala ngeposi! Izitika zakho zizothunyelwa ngemvilophu emhlophe.
stickers_instructions_2: Idatha yekheli iyasuswa ngemuva kokuthumela izitika zakho zamahhala.
stickers_share_c1: Yabelana ngezindawo zakho zezitika nathi ku-Nostr futhi ubone ukuthi abanye abantu babeka kuphi izitika zabo.
stickers_flyers_link_after: ukuze usize u-orange pill abantu abaningi.
